libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment variables or system properties are required. The observed javac failure is a source-compatibility issue: org.codehaus.janino.util.iterator.Iterables is no longer present in janino 3.1.0; tests should avoid that old internal package or use the relocated org.codehaus.commons.compiler.util.iterator.Iterables if iterator utilities are intentionally covered.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8855 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.codehaus.janino:janino:3.1.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The optional org.apache.ant:ant dependency is only needed if tests deliberately exercise Janino Ant integration; do not add it for normal compiler/evaluator coverage.
Janino dynamically compiles and loads classes, so native-image limitations still need validation through the existing Gradle/native-image tasks.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Janino 3.1.0 does not need extra setup beyond the normal test scaffold: its required commons-compiler artifact is a transitive dependency, and normal documented usage is in-process compiler/evaluator APIs without Docker or environment/system properties.
